description: SAM-only subset of manifest.verified.json. Revised 2026-04-21: dropped biopython-4825 (perf), htsjdk-1538 (API), htsjdk-1561 (wrong anchor), htsjdk-1489 (API); added htsjdk-1238/1360/1410 (parse-time).

anchor.verification_rule: git rev-parse confirmed: PR #2418 merge commit + parent

trigger.description: BAM parsing forgets to consume sequence bytes when creating dummy alignments; stream iterator misaligned, corrupts subsequent record reads.
trigger.notes: Trigger file test.bam.gz present in original issue #2417.

anchor.verification_rule: git rev-parse confirmed: PR #3081 merge commit + parent

trigger.description: Empty SAM/BAM output files invalid (no header written); file unusable unless records explicitly written.

anchor.verification_rule: ANCHOR DEFECT 2026-04-21: pre-fix SHA ca4d66839 is the merge commit of PR #3263 (dependabot bump), NOT PR #3269. Post-fix commit 11564cb3 message says "Fixes #3266: Incorrect begin/end of alignment for banded alignment" — i.e. the actual fix is for issue #3266, not PR #3269. Paradigm-out anyway (alignment-internal); SHA citation retained pending follow-up.

trigger.description: Banded alignment returns relative positions of sliced sequences instead of absolute positions of originals; off-by-prefix offset.

anchor.verification_rule: ANCHOR DEFECT 2026-04-21: pre-fix SHA 4961904fb is the merge commit of PR #3097 ([TEST] API), NOT PR #3098. Post-fix commit 4fe54891 message says "[FIX] Alignment Wrong alignment score #3043" — i.e. the actual fix is for issue #3043, not PR #3098. Manifest entry retained since the bug is paradigm-out anyway (alignment-internal score field), but the SHA citation is misleading and should be repaired in a follow-up.

trigger.description: Alignment score calculation wrong in traceback; incorrect carry bit tracking on up/left open directions causes wrong score.

anchor.verification_rule: git log --merges found merge commit edbfa956f for PR #2869 (correct_id_parsing_fasta)

trigger.description: FASTA parser fails on IDs containing '>' character; treats '> >MyID' as ID 'MyID' instead of '>MyID'.
trigger.notes: FASTA-adjacent — may be out of SAM scope; evaluate during pre-flight.

anchor.verification_rule: ANCHOR DEFECT 2026-04-21: pre-fix SHA 745c645fe is the merge commit of PR #3404 (clang22 fix), NOT PR #3406. Real PR #3406 merge commit is d0f13f32 (BGZF data race port from seqan2). Paradigm-out anyway (concurrency, non-deterministic); SHA citation retained pending follow-up.

trigger.description: BGZF stream data race condition in concurrent reads; non-deterministic corruption.
trigger.notes: Data race — requires multithreaded harness; may be hard to trigger reliably in 2h.

anchor.verification_rule: htsjdk PR #1238 added validateSequenceName regex check in SAMSequenceRecord; pre-2.18.2 only checked whitespace.

trigger.description: Pre-fix SAM header parser accepts @SQ SN: values containing characters disallowed by SAM 1.6 RNAME regex (e.g. comma). Post-fix rejects via SAMSequenceRecord.validateSequenceName. Spec mandates rejection.
trigger.notes: Reverse §5.3.1 detection: pre accepts (matches htslib's lenient stance), post rejects.

anchor.verification_rule: htsjdk PR #1360 (closes issue #1174) removed EMPTY_READ validation block from SAMRecord.isValid(). Pre-fix throws SAMFormatException under default STRICT stringency.

trigger.description: Pre-fix htsjdk rejects zero-length reads (SEQ=*/QUAL=*) without FZ/CS/CQ tag with SAMFormatException; post-fix accepts. htslib/pysam accept silently. Spec does not require rejection.
trigger.notes: Forward §5.3.1 detection: pre rejects (outlier), post accepts (matches htslib).

anchor.verification_rule: htsjdk PR #1410 raised SAMRecord.MAX_INSERT_SIZE from 1<<29 to Integer.MAX_VALUE. Pre-fix throws INVALID_INSERT_SIZE under STRICT.

trigger.description: Pre-fix htsjdk rejects records with |TLEN| > 2^29 even though SAM spec allows up to int32-max. Post-fix accepts. htslib/pysam accept any int32 TLEN.
trigger.notes: Forward §5.3.1 detection: pre rejects valid spec-compliant input; post accepts.
